summary: Iter79 — Admin Data Export feature tested end-to-end. All 10 backend tests + full frontend UI flow PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: data_export.py CSV streaming: When _flatten emits a NEW header after the first batch (post-2000-row), the new column is appended to `headers` for *that* row, but earlier rows already written omit that column — they end up shorter than the header by one cell. Mitigated via _extras column wrapping, but the per-row DictWriter is being re-instantiated on every loop with a possibly-mutating fieldnames list which can cause inconsistent column counts in the CSV. Edge case only fires on collections with >2000 docs whose later docs introduce new keys; not hit in current dataset.
_get_client() never closes; module-level singleton is fine for this app but should ideally hook into FastAPI app lifespan.
preview endpoint does not 404 on bogus collection (returns rows: [], total: 0). Matches backend behaviour but is mildly inconsistent with csv/json endpoints which 404. Document or unify.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing data (test_database has 47 collections, summer_camp_bookings has 70 docs).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend route at /app/backend/routes/data_export.py mounts under /api/admin/data-export. Frontend page at /admin/data-export. All data-testid attributes match the spec (refresh-databases-btn, db-pick-{name}, search-collections-input, collection-row-{name}, csv-{name}, json-{name}, preview-{name}). 4 visible DBs: test_database (primary, 47 cols, 1232 docs), oll_hub, oll_multiuser, teach_n_learn. summer_camp_bookings = 70 docs; CSV returns 71 lines incl header, JSON returns 70 NDJSON lines, both consistent.
verified_flows: GET /api/admin/data-export/databases — 4 DBs incl test_database flagged primary
GET preview/csv/json for summer_camp_bookings — all OK
Bogus collection returns 404 for csv/json, 200 empty for preview
Frontend: Database pills with PRIMARY badge render, search filter works
Preview modal opens with dark JSON pre block, close button works
CSV header row + 70 data rows == 70 NDJSON lines (consistency check passes)
